goal_text:
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should go to 'cambridge' and should 'leave after 08:15'.
The train should leave on 'wednesday' and should depart from 'bishops stortford'.
Make sure you get 'travel time' and 'train ID'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for a train. The train should go to cambridge and should leave after 08:15
The train should leave on wednesday and should depart from bishops stortford
Make sure you get travel time and train ID
